## Recipe Improvements (2026-03-02)

All role recipes have been updated with the following enhancements:

| Improvement | Description | Status |
|-------------|-------------|--------|
| File extension | Changed from `.yml.j2` to `.yaml.j2` for goose CLI compatibility | ✅ |
| `prompt` field | Added for headless mode execution | ✅ |
| `extensions` format | Fixed to use `type: builtin, name: developer` | ✅ |
| `response` schema | Added structured output validation | ✅ |
| `retry` config | Added automated retry with success validation | ✅ |

### Recipe Schema

Each recipe now includes:
- `version`, `title`, `description` — metadata
- `instructions` — detailed role instructions
- `prompt` — short prompt for headless execution
- `activities` — clickable activity bubbles (Desktop only)
- `extensions` — typically `[{type: builtin, name: developer}]`
- `parameters` — optional parameters (e.g., `feature`)
- `response` — JSON schema for structured output
- `retry` — retry configuration with success checks

### Example Recipe Structure

```yaml
version: "1.0.0"
title: "Architect — sdd-server"
description: "Define technical architecture"

instructions: |
  You are the Architect...
  (detailed instructions)

prompt: |
  Review the PRD at specs/prd.md and generate the architecture.

extensions:
  - type: builtin
    name: developer

parameters:
  - key: feature
    input_type: string
    requirement: optional
    default: ""
    description: Feature subdirectory to focus on

response:
  json_schema:
    type: object
    properties:
      spec_updated:
        type: boolean
      components_defined:
        type: array
        items:
          type: string
    required:
      - spec_updated

retry:
  max_retries: 2
  timeout_seconds: 300
  checks:
    - type: shell
      command: "test -f specs/arch.md"
  on_failure: "echo 'Architecture generation failed.'"
```
